label: Sootlamp Sleep Niche
description: Sootlamp Sleep Niche is a narrow, ash-sealed bedroom cut into the slagcrete mass of Sootlamp Quarters, its corners chamfered to reduce grit traps during decontamination. A wall-folded bunk and a recessed locker bay dominate the space, their surfaces finished in vitrified coating that takes the bruise-colored auroral glare as cold violet sheen. A gasketed vent grille and a low-pressure return slot maintain filtered circulation, leaving the air faintly metallic and dry. A shielded lumen strip set into a shallow ceiling chase provides hard, shadowless illumination suited to the quarters’ sealed, utilitarian order.
